name: Google Workspace
description: Connect agents to Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets, Chat, Admin, and other Workspace APIs through the gws CLI and its agent skills

fields.label: Google Workspace CLI Credentials JSON
fields.description: Credentials exported with `gws auth export --unmasked` or generated by a Shadow-hosted OAuth flow.

fields.label: Google Workspace Access Token
fields.description: Optional short-lived access token. Used when credentials JSON is not supplied.

fields.label: Model Armor Template
fields.description: Optional Model Armor template resource used by gws sanitization flags.

services.description: Workspace services this Buddy should prefer, such as gmail, calendar, drive, docs, sheets, chat, or admin.

readOnlyByDefault.description: Require explicit user approval before create, update, send, or delete actions.
